name: Poulsbo Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except sunflower seeds in a large bowl.
2. If using sunflower seeds, mix them into the batter before baking.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased pan and bake at 375°F (190°C) until golden brown and crusty, about 30-35 minutes.
4. This soft bread will be difficult to slice when hot. Allow it to cool completely before using in sandwiches.
